description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is primarily finished in smooth gray materials, with large windows on the front and rear facades allowing for ample natural light. The house features a driveway leading to a garage at the front, and landscaped greenery with small trees and shrubs along the sides. The rear of the house includes a patio or deck area, visible through sliding glass doors, suggesting an indoor-outdoor living space. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a subtle tiered effect. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, and a garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry, and large windows, with a driveway and some landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, flat-roofed profile and minimal window openings, with trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patio or deck area, sliding glass doors, and more greenery, with the upper story set back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat, continuous wall with minimal windows and landscaping along the edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway integrated with the garage, featuring a flush door and minimal overhang, with a paved driveway and simple landscaping.
